author: anon-ab6221f8
content: On closer inspection, all callers already dispatch V1 vs V2 before reaching sync.claim_lock/release_lock. The V1 functions are only called on V1 layouts. The issue was that the functions themselves don't enforce this — they silently do the wrong thing if called on V2. Adding a V2 guard that bails with a clear error instead of silently writing to the wrong file.
